title: Backstab forces primary creature first, auto-hit, and triple damage

card.rawText: During your turn, this card allows your primary creature to attack first, automatically hit, and inflict 3x Atk damage.

plan.title: Backstab forces primary creature first, auto-hit, and triple damage
plan.summary: Play before battle, verify slower primary attacks first, skips hit miss risk, and applies 3x damage for current battle only.

forcedRolls.label: would miss if auto-hit not active

notes: Player_1 primary should have lower SPD than defender to prove forced first.

steps: Play Backstab during player_1 turn before combat.
Enter COMBAT and attack with player_1 primary creature.
Run a second battle without replaying Backstab if possible.

expectedAssertions.label: Primary attacks first despite lower SPD

manualVerification: Confirm Backstab goes to cemetery after standard magic resolution.
riskNotes: Runtime support is partial and may only provide manual battle resolver suggestions.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Plan verifies priority override, auto-hit override, multiplier, and current-battle cleanup.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
